title: hunnycook Stainless Steel Mixing Bowl - 7P Mixing Bowls Set with Lids for Prepping, Salad Mixing Bowl & Storage Food, Kitchen Large Mixing Bowls Set -Size 0.7, 1.1, 1.5, 2.1, 3.5, 4, 4.5QT
features: 【Cost-effective with 7 sizes】The hunnycook 7-piece mixing bowl set comes in sizes 0.7QT, 1.1QT, 1.5QT, 2.1QT, 3.5QT, 4QT to 4.5QT.It not only meets a variety of needs in the kitchen, but also provides you with a larger cooking space for your choice.

【Food Grade Stainless Steel】This mixing bowls for baking is made of high-quality food grade stainless steel, ensuring durability, resistance to rust and corrosion. From vigorous mixing to long-lasting storage, each mixing bowl is built to withstand the rigors of everyday use in the kitchen.

【Versatile and Multi-functional】This 7-piece salad bowl with lid is an indispensable kitchen companion that can be used in a variety of scenarios. Whether you're mixing ingredients, tossing salads, marinating meats, washing fruit or serving snacks, the mixing bowls make it easy. It is the first choice for cooking enthusiasts and professional chefs.

【BPA-Free Lids】Each salad bowl comes with a BPA-free lid that makes storing and carrying food easier and more convenient, as well as insulating it from outside contaminants and preventing spills, while allowing flavors to be retained for a long time.

【Stackable Design】The 7 stainless steel mixing bowls are made with practicality in mind and can be nested together in layers. The stackable feature saves space in your kitchen cabinets and makes your kitchen look more neat and organized.

【Easy to Clean】Our metal mixing bowls are smooth and shiny and a breeze to clean. They can be washed by hand with water and drinking soap or put directly into the dishwasher. It is important to note that the lid avoids being placed in the dishwasher as the high temperature and pressure environment may cause the lid to warp.
description: Product Description Why choose Hunnycook's 7-piece stainless steel mixing bowl set? DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: These stainless steel bowls are made of high quality stainless steel to stand up to daily use and retain their luster for a long time. PRACTICAL DESIGN: Each metal salad bowl has a BPA-free lid that makes storing and carrying food easier and safer. EASY MAINTENANCE: Smooth interior makes it effortless to clean either by hand or in the dishwasher. SPACE SAVING: This mixing bowl set can be stacked on top of each other, this design saves valuable cabinet space and is easy to access, keeping your kitchen organized. SAFE AND SUSTAINBLE: Food-grade materials ensure safety, while stainless steel is an environmentally sustainable choice. Experience the difference with Hunnycook's set of 7 mixing bowls with lids for baking, Whether it's for everyday meals or special occasions, they're up to the task and will be your right-hand man. This stainless steel mixing bowl set offers 7 size options to meet different kitchen usage needs and scenarios. Whether it's home cooking or professional kitchens, you can find suitable combinations of size and functionality. △0.7 quarts : for mixing small amounts of dressings, sauces, etc. △1.1 quarts : for mixing smaller amounts of flour, sugar and other baking ingredients △1.5 quarts :For marinating mashed potatoes, pasta, and other mixed entrees. △ 2.1 quarts :Makes larger salads or prepares multiple servings △3.5 quarts : Mixes cake batter and makes cookie dough. △4 quarts : Can be used to mix large batches of flour, prepare large salads △4.5 quarts : Use as a large salad platter or to store leftovers. You can mix the flour, sugar, salt and other dry ingredients in a salad bowl, which can also be used to beat the egg and temper the dough. The stainless steel mixing bowls offers enough capacity to wash large quantities of fruit at once, such as apples, pears, peaches or strawberries. This is particularly suitable for family gatherings or occasions where large quantities of fruit need to be prepared. This mixing bowls for baking is designed with a stacking feature, a design that makes them easier and more efficient to store and pick up for use.
